# PERF-172 positive: wg.Wait blocks handler before response write
lang: go
file: PERF-172-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

func BlockingHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(1)
	go func() {
		wg.Done()
	}()
	wg.Wait()
	w.Write([]byte("done"))
}
